top_signals.title: Chinese Banks Rein in Retail Gold Trading on Volatility
top_signals.summary: Some major Chinese banks are shutting down services that aid retail trading in precious metals, after a multiyear rally in gold and silver went into reverse in recent months.

top_signals.title: Securing the service desk: Why social engineering attacks keep succeeding
top_signals.summary: Service desks have become a favored target for attackers seeking password resets, MFA changes, and access to corporate accounts. Specops Software breaks down how service desk social engineering attacks work and how organizations can defend against them. [...]

top_signals.title: Permian natural gas production increased faster than crude oil
top_signals.summary: The Permian region's marketed natural gas production grew from 17.2 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) in 2021 to 27.6 Bcf/d in 2025, a 60% increase, according to data from our latest Short Term Energy Outlook. Over the same period, crude oil production grew by 39%, going from 4.7 million barrels per day (b/d) to 6.6 million b/d. The higher growth in natural gas production is the result of increasing gas-oil ratios (GOR).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Second worker dies at BYD's Hungary factory already under scrutiny for labor practices
top_signals.summary: A second worker died at the construction site of BYD's electric vehicle factory in Hungary, CNBC has learned.

top_signals.summary: Kalshi's reported valuation reflects the firm's rapid growth, as it reported a $5 billion valuation last October.
